channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish inc small bike in pond, 12th May
item.description:
A small bike and lots of litter and rubbish dumped in the pond at Priory Gardens. This looks awful and And is a danger to the wildlife.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, High Street, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Skip and [Portable loo] on public highway and residents parking bay, 12th May
item.description:
Skip in residents parking bay that is not marked as suspended. The skip has no lighting. And has pallets strewn around it. In another bay opposite is a [portable loo]. Again no light and dangerous position opposite the skip. This area has a lot of traffic due to the doctors surgery with elderly drivers who are struggling to navigate.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Church Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag dumped next to pavement, 12th May
item.description:
And again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood, 12th May
item.description:
Wood

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 130, Stockwell Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bag of household waste, 12th May
item.description:
Black bag of household waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, Stockwell Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builder waste in hutter, 12th May
item.description:
Outside 50 Stockwell Green

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Stockwell Green, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the Island between Pakenham Street, Wren Street & Calthorpe Street, 12th May
item.description:
There is a paving stone which sticks up and I fell over it today. I have a cut lip, chipped tooth, bruised hands and knee.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pakenham Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 12th May
item.description:
Dumped wardrobe and furniture it’s been there for weeks. It’s outside number opposite house number 4 duriun way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duriun Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive amount of litter in the grass of this new estate, 12th May
item.description:
Excessive amount of litter in the grass of this new build estate. Loads of litter around and it seems to be getting worse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ignatius Sancho Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pallet and other rubbish dumped, 12th May
item.description:
Wooden pallet and packaging and additional rubbish dumped in alcove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I reported fly tipping - you stated it was resolved. its still there, 12th May
item.description:
I made a report of fly tipping in this area of a fridge-freezer and other rubbish. You have stated that the issue is resolved. It is not. The fridge remains as does other rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 12th May
item.description:
This pothole has been there for a long period of time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling bins overflowing again outside St Owen House, 12th May
item.description:
The recycling bins outside St Owen House are always full and overflowing. They should be in a locked bin store to stop unauthorised usage. Tonight two drug addicts emptied the bins all over the floor.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on black shutter next to 294 Brixton road SW9., 12th May
item.description:
Graffiti has been sprayed on a black shutter at 294 Brixton road SW9. The symbol is of a star its fairly small in size. Unfortunately the same individual has sprayed this symbol along Brixton main Rd. Please can it be removed it been there for over a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 290, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tipping, 12th May
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped And more is being put there. It’s in Carlisle road and BlythRoad road It’s been there a very long time And the m o h. Are putting more stuff there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blyth Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown weeds and grass through pavement, 12th May
item.description:
Overgrown weeds and grass through pavement need to be fixed before they ruin the repaving of the street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19A, Worlingham Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant litters across Finsbury Market road, 12th May
item.description:
There is a huge amount of litter scattered across this Finsbury Market side road and it has been there for at least over 2 weeks accumulating. This street really needs a bin or at least signs to discourage this.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Finsbury Market, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is litter from the people from the council that cut the tree, 12th May
item.description:
It’s scraps from the tree and rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Austen Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge Poo left inside of communal area, 12th May
item.description:
I believe someone pooped next to the lift at ground floor. Please don't let me upload pictures, it's quite fresh...
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Falkirk Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public tree in desperate need of pollarding, 12th May
item.description:
Public tree is severely overgrown at risk of causing damage to public park and nearby properties. Please could this be addressed ASAP before an incident occurs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
